properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Humbly to the earth you came Born into this world to save God with us, Emmanuel Now we adore Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your name, is a strong and mighty tower Your name, is a shelter like no other Your name, let the nations sing it louder 'Cause nothing has the power to save But Your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus in Your name we pray Come and fill our hearts today Lord give us strength to live for You And glorify Your name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God with us Emmanuel God with us Emmanuel God with us Emmanuel No we adore Your Name
